frames.name: panel-07-hook-hand-gesture-stage-retry
frames.prompt: Use the provided image as the continuity anchor. Create the next Switchlight MV keyframe with the same five fictional LUMINA members on the same pearl/chrome stage. Keep the same wardrobe family, lighting, reflective black floor, and member identities. Rae is center; the group forms a clean diagonal hook formation. Hands are lifted near shoulder height for a simple original switch-light gesture. Vertical 9:16 music-video still. No text, logos, product props, real celebrity likeness, or copied choreography.

frames.name: panel-08-step-pose-shine-hit-stage-retry
frames.prompt: Use the provided image as the continuity anchor. Create the next Switchlight MV keyframe with the same five fictional LUMINA members on the same stage. The group lands a clean synchronized pose after one forward step. Rae remains center; Jia and Nari look sharper and more athletic; Sena and Yumi frame the sides. Five pearl light columns glow behind them and reflect on the black chrome floor. Vertical 9:16 music-video still. No text, logos, product props, real celebrity likeness, or copied choreography.

frames.name: panel-09-final-switchlight-pose-stage-retry
frames.prompt: Use the provided image as the continuity anchor. Create the final Switchlight MV keyframe with the same five fictional LUMINA members holding a confident final group pose on the same pearl/chrome stage. Rae is calm center; Jia angled and confident; Sena luminous; Nari grounded; Yumi warm. Pearl lights are fully on, chrome arches frame the group, and the reflective black floor glows. Vertical 9:16 music-video still. No text, logos, product props, real celebrity likeness, or copied choreography.
